subject: History
overall_learning_objectives: Understand why the East India Company came to India
Learn about trading factories and early trade activities
Understand the Battle of Plassey and its importance
Learn about the Battle of Buxar
Understand the meaning of Diwani rights
Explain how the Company changed from traders to rulers

lesson_plan.title: Introduction to the East India Company
teaching_strategy: Use of map showing trade routes
student_activities: List goods traded by the East India Company
Locate major trading cities like Surat and Madras on a map

lesson_plan.title: Trading Factories and Early Settlements
student_activities: Mark trading centers on a map
Write two functions of trading factories

lesson_plan.title: Battle of Plassey
topics_covered: Causes and results of the Battle of Plassey
student_activities: Write key events of the Battle of Plassey
Create a small timeline for the battle

lesson_plan.title: Battle of Buxar
topics_covered: Events leading to the Battle of Buxar
student_activities: List the leaders involved in the Battle of Buxar
Write two results of the battle

lesson_plan.title: Diwani Rights and Company Power
student_activities: Explain Diwani rights in simple words
Discuss how revenue collection increased Company power

lesson_plan.title: From Trade to Territory and Revision
topics_covered: Change from trade to political power
student_activities: Write three reasons for the expansion of Company rule

teacher_tip: Use stories and maps while teaching the chapter so that students can easily understand how a trading company gradually became a ruling power in India.
